title: Hierophant Lean (JCraft: EOE)
description: Replaces HG skin2 with Hierophant Lean (JOJO, JJBA)
body:
Replaces HG skin2 with Hierophant Lean

First seen in Stardust Crusaders during the Jotaro Kujo and Noriaki Kakyoin fight.

Changes the apparence of your JoJo stand
